text.title: Regression Eval Before Fix Rule Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to apply the rule on a single incident.

step.name: reproduce-incident
step.action: Extract deterministic input (prompt, tool calls, context) that reproduces the bug; record in tracker.
step.decision-gate: If not reproducible, mark `no-fix; transient` and STOP.

step.name: commit-failing-eval
step.action: Author `eval/regressions/INC-XXX.jsonl` with expected vs observed; commit; confirm CI shows it failing on main.

step.name: open-fix-pr
step.action: Open fix PR; reference the eval-case path; required check must already be failing before any code change.
step.output: Fix PR open with red eval check.

step.name: iterate-until-flip
step.action: Iterate code changes until the new eval case passes AND no existing eval regresses. CI gates merge.

step.name: commit-decision-record
step.action: Commit `docs/regressions/INC-XXX.md` linking incident → eval_case_path → fix_pr → root-cause-class. Run `scripts/validate-regression-eval-before-fix-rule.py --file record.json`.
